text:
Created attachment 151709
Patch to update x11/lsw to 0.3

Hi,
I have a patch to update the port x11/lsx to 0.3. The Poudriere Build Log will be uploaded shortly.

Keep in mind that this is a resubmission, as the Bugzilla backend error has lost some information, especially the automatic assignment to the port's maintainer.
Thanks,
Neel
